author: kundor
text: generate-rcfile does not include options given on the command line

author: kundor
text:
### Steps to reproduce

1. `pylint -d RP0401 --generate-rcfile > .pylintrc`

### Current behavior

The generated rcfile does not disable report RP0401.

The relevant line is

```
disable=hex-method,input-builtin,intern-builtin,long-suffix,reduce-builtin,next-method-called,execfile-builtin,map-builtin-not-iterating,getslice-method,dict-iter-method,old-raise-syntax,buffer-builtin,unpacking-in-except,zip-builtin-not-iterating,dict-view-method,parameter-unpacking,backtick,metaclass-assignment,standarderror-builtin,old-ne-operator,coerce-builtin,basestring-builtin,unicode-builtin,raw_input-builtin,file-builtin,old-division,oct-method,cmp-method,unichr-builtin,long-builtin,using-cmp-argument,old-octal-literal,xrange-builtin,filter-builtin-not-iterating,no-absolute-import,print-statement,nonzero-method,reload-builtin,round-builtin,suppressed-message,useless-suppression,coerce-method,import-star-module-level,cmp-builtin,delslice-method,setslice-method,indexing-exception,apply-builtin,range-builtin-not-iterating,raising-string
```

### Expected behavior

The generated rcfile does disable report RP0401. That is, the above line should have `,RP0401` appended.

### pylint --version output

pylint 1.6.4,  
astroid 1.4.8  
Python 3.5.2 |Anaconda custom (64-bit)| (default, Jul 2 2016, 17:53:06)  
[GCC 4.4.7 20120313 (Red Hat 4.4.7-1)]

author: PCManticore
text:
That's because that code is not actually a message code that pylint emits, but a reporting section. Disabling report sections is currently supported through a hack in pylint: <https://github.com/PyCQA/pylint/blob/2beb5e650d689d4903676b5ca6d82a1806bbbe79/pylint/utils.py#L249>

I don't think this is ever going to be more granular than it is right now, so I'm closing this issue.
